creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This is a restricted port for which the distfile is only legitimately
available from http://www.research.att.com/sw/tools/sfio/ .  On that site,
version 1998 is no longer available.  Version 1999 naturally has a
different checksum.  Changes to a header file cause one of the patches in
the port to fail.  Two man pages have been removed, and one added, causing
"make install" to fail.

How-To-Repeat: 
Try to build the port.
